Code content extracted to temp file /tmp/snake_final.py for verification; python3 -m py_compile on extracted code returned exit code 0 (syntax valid), but the actual generated file was never persisted and cannot be executed from the project location.

summary: FAIL — The generated Snake game code was never saved as a .py file in the project directory (only README.md, pipeline-report.md, and JSON metadata files exist). The inline code content is syntactically valid Python/Pygame with proper game loop structure, but it is truncated/incomplete: it ends with an undefined variable 'Fa' (causing NameError at runtime) and lacks the entry point call if __name__ == '__main__': main(). Game over restart logic is incomplete. Confirmed failure scenarios: (2) No Python files exist despite sessions marked completed; (4) Code is truncated preventing full analysis; (5) File tree contains only README.md and metadata files; (6) Files are missing indicating the implementation was never properly saved.
